name: Bedford International Athletics Stadium
metaTitle: Bedford International Athletics Stadium | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and tracking information for the Bedford International Athletics Stadium.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Tue–Fri 09:00–22:00, Sat–Sun 09:00–17:30. Please note the stadium is closed on Mondays.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Pay-as-you-go options and memberships are available through Better. Contact the stadium for current rates.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A premier competition venue featuring an 8-lane 400m track and comprehensive field event facilities.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking is available for 115 vehicles, including designated disabled parking spaces.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Better page for the Bedford International Athletics Stadium for bookings.
